heading: Retroactive application for certain liquidations and reliquidations of textile or apparel goods
label: 4034 Retroactive application for certain liquidations and reliquidations of textile or apparel goods
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section by , see Effective and Termination Dates note below.section 107(d) of Pub. L. 109–53

Effective Date of 2006 AmendmentAmendment by applicable with respect to goods entered, or withdrawn from warehouse for consumption, on or after the 15th day after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 109–280section 1641 of Pub. L. 109–280section 58c of this titleAug. 17, 2006

children.label: A
children.text: of a CAFTA–DR country that the United States Trade Representative has designated as an eligible country under subsection (b), and

children.label: B
children.text: that would have qualified as an originating good under if the good had been entered after the date of entry into force of the Agreement for that country,section 4033 of this title
that was made on or after , and before the date of the entry into force of the Agreement with respect to that country or any other CAFTA–DR country, andJanuary 1, 2004
for which customs duties in excess of the applicable rate of duty for that good set out in the Schedule of the United States to Annex 3.3 of the Agreement were paid,

children.heading: Eligible country
children.label: b Eligible country
children.text: The United States Trade Representative shall determine, in accordance with article 3.20 of the Agreement, which CAFTA–DR countries are eligible countries for purposes of this section, and shall publish a list of all such countries in the Federal Register.

children.label: B
children.text: to reconstruct the entry if it cannot be located; and
to determine that the good satisfies the conditions set out in subsection (a).

children.heading: Definition
children.label: d Definition
children.text: As used in this section, the term “entry” includes a withdrawal from warehouse for consumption.
